question.text: What is the minimum contribution a sponsor must make to the net worth of the AMC as per SEBI Mutual Fund Regulations?

answer.text: Minimum 51% of the net worth of the AMC
Minimum 50% of the net worth of the AMC
Minimum 40% of the net worth of the AMC
Minimum 25% of the net worth of the AMC

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per SEBI MF Regulations, the sponsor should contribute a minimum of 40% to the net worth of the AMC. **The Trap:** 51% is often confused with controlling interest, but the regulation specifically states 40%. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The 40% threshold ensures sponsors have significant skin in the game.
